ready.doc: Status pill — task is ready to claim.

waiting.doc: Status pill — task is waiting on open dependencies (V2.7 hard-deps).

blocked.doc: Status pill — task is blocked (a dep was removed/cancelled).

claimed.doc: Status pill — task has an assignee.

submitted.doc: Status pill — task has been submitted for review.

rejected.doc: Status pill — submission was rejected; assignee can re-work + resubmit.

complete.doc: Status pill — task is fully done (substrate flag completedAt set).

unknown.doc: Status pill — status is missing/garbage; rendered as a dash.

coordinator.doc: Crew role — coordinator (manage tasks + members; no remove).

external-volunteer.doc: Crew role — external; can claim tagged tasks only.

project.doc: Crew kind chip — a time-bound project.

team.doc: Crew kind chip — a standing team.

friends.doc: Crew kind chip — a circle of friends.

maintenance.doc: Crew kind chip — a maintenance crew.

self-mark.doc: Approval mode — assignee marks complete; no review.
